case_title: JOSE MALDONADO VS. MICHAEL SHANE PERRIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $35) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, JULIE NICOLE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-26-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSE MALDONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SHANE PERRIN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIE NICOLE NGUYEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOFS OF SERVICES ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,309.00 FILED BY MALDONADO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT PERRIN, MICHAEL SHANE NGUYEN, JULIE NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT PERRIN, MICHAEL SHANE
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
